title: verbascum × gabrielianae
intro: Verbascum × gabrielianae, also known as Gabriel's Mugwort or Gabriel's Mullein, is a hybrid plant species within the Verbascum genus, characterized by its large, yellow flowers and tall stem. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties, which make it effective in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. The health benefits of Verbascum × gabrielianae include soothing irritated skin, reducing fever, and promoting relaxation due to its sedative properties. Herbal preparations of Verbascum × gabrielianae include infusions, teas, and tinctures, which can be used to support respiratory health and calm the nervous system.
